---
title: "Writing"
---

A collection of writing outside the bounds of academic work — on art, on travel, and on ideas that run alongside my research.

---

### [Reflections](reflections/index.qmd)

On art, books, and the things that stay with you.

---

### [Travel](travel/index.qmd)

Notes from places visited: the textures, rhythms, and details that stay with you.

---

### [Essays](essays/index.qmd)

Longer-form thinking on economics, culture, and the spaces where they overlap.
